title: Her Winning Way
writer: Douglas Z. Doty, Edgar Jepson, Lechmere Worrall
actors: Mary Miles Minter, Gaston Glass, Carrie Clark Ward
plot: Ann Annington, book reviewer for a metropolitan newspaper, is assigned to interview author Harold Hargrave. Knowing that Hargrave has resisted previous attempts, Ann obtains a position in his apartment as a maid and resolves to br...
